summary: DiskWise gets a refreshed brand identity — new app icon, marketing site colors and typography, and an animated scanning logo on startup and in the Dock.
introduced: Brand icon — database checkmark logo across the macOS app, DMG installer, website header, favicon, and social preview image
Animated scanning logo — startup splash and Dock tile use the layered scanning artwork with a rotating ring and moving scan beam during setup and volume scans
Marketing site refresh — hero logo, Montserrat typography, and logo-matched blue/charcoal theme replace the previous multi-color accent palette
changed: Website SEO — Open Graph and Twitter metadata now point at the new app icon on diskwise.suherman.net
Icon pipeline — app and dock scanning assets regenerate from canonical raw PNG sources with white-background transparency support
